# Schneider Electric

**Category:** Modular / Prefabricated, Power Infrastructure, Cooling  
**Website:** https://www.se.com/

## Headline
Large-scale infrastructure player with modular, power, and cooling relevance across AI-ready deployments.

## Overview
Schneider Electric is one of the most recognizable infrastructure vendors in the data center market, with capabilities spanning power, cooling, management software, and modular deployment approaches. For buyers evaluating AI infrastructure, Schneider is relevant less as a niche specialist and more as a broad platform vendor with deep enterprise familiarity.

## Key capabilities
- modular and prefabricated infrastructure solutions
- power and electrical systems
- cooling and management ecosystem

## Best fit for
- enterprise deployments
- complex infrastructure environments
- buyers seeking broad-stack vendor credibility

## Considerations
Best for buyers who want established vendor depth; may be less attractive for teams looking only for highly specialized niche providers.
